name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year to small and marginal farmer families across India, paid in three equal installments.
benefits: ₹6,000/year direct bank transfer in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Financial assistance for construction of pucca houses for all houseless and those living in kutcha/dilapidated houses in rural areas.
benefits: ₹1.2 lakh (plains) / ₹1.3 lakh (hilly areas) for house construction

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households to replace unhealthy cooking fuels.
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefits: Free LPG connection + first refill free + EMI facility for stove and refill

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
benefits: ₹5 lakh/year health insurance coverage per family

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
description: Loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises for business development.
benefits: Loans: Shishu (₹50K), Kishor (₹50K-5L), Tarun (₹5L-10L) at low interest rates

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for the girl child to encourage parents to build a fund for future education and marriage expenses.
benefits: 7.6% interest rate, tax benefits under Section 80C, maturity at age 21

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Financial assistance to SC students for studies at post-matriculation level to enable them to complete higher education.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: ₹1,200 to ₹3,800/month maintenance allowance + course fees

name: Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students pursuing post-matriculation or post-secondary education.
benefits: Full fee reimbursement + maintenance allowance

name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Scholarship to Other Backward Classes students to pursue post-matric or post-secondary education.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: ₹1,000 to ₹2,500/month + fee reimbursement

name: SVAMITVA Scheme
description: Survey of villages and mapping with improvised technology to provide property rights to residents of rural areas.
benefits: Property card (title deed) for residential land in rural areas

name: Startup India Scheme
description: Government initiative to build a strong ecosystem for innovation and startups in India, driving sustainable economic growth.
benefits: Tax exemptions, funding support, fast-track patent filing, mentorship network

name: Stand Up India
description: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Loans ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Credit card for farmers to meet agricultural and allied needs with flexible repayment options and low interest rates.
benefits: Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest rate (after 2% interest subvention)

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Initiative to address declining child sex ratio and promote welfare and education of the girl child.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Financial incentives, scholarship, awareness programs for girl child education

name: Mahatma Gandhi NREGA
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households whose adult members volunteer for unskilled manual work.
benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment at ₹200-350/day (state-wise), unemployment allowance if work not provided

name: National Food Security Act (NFSA) Ration
description: Subsidized food grains to eligible households under Priority Households and Antyodaya Anna Yojana categories.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
benefits: 5kg food grains/person/month at ₹1-3/kg (rice, wheat, coarse grains)

name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
description: Pension scheme for unorganised sector workers ensuring minimum assured pension of ₹3,000/month after age 60.
benefits: ₹3,000/month pension after 60 years, family pension of 50% on death

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Skill development initiative to enable youth to take up industry-relevant skill training and become employable.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefits: Free skill training + ₹500/month stipend + placement assistance + certificate

name: Nari Shakti Puraskar
description: Award and support scheme for women achieving excellence in different fields and contributing to women empowerment.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: ₹2 lakh cash award + certificate of excellence + recognition

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme offering coverage of ₹2 lakh at nominal annual premium for bank account holders.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life cover at just ₹436/year premium

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental insurance scheme offering ₹2 lakh accidental death/disability cover at just ₹20/year.
benefits: ₹2 lakh accidental death cover / ₹1 lakh partial disability at ₹20/year
